description: MCP tool configuration for the AI Software Factory pipeline

filesystem.description: Gives agents read/write access to the repo working tree

sequential-thinking.description: Enables structured reasoning chains for complex implementation tasks

inputs.description: GitHub personal access token with repo + pull_request scope
Absolute path to the repository root on disk

notes: GITHUB_TOKEN is injected automatically by GitHub Actions via secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN.
When running agents locally, set GITHUB_TOKEN as an environment variable.
Add new servers here if the pipeline needs access to Jira, Linear, Slack, etc.
